Ingredients String: Chicken thigh (500g) | Coconut milk (400ml) | Red curry paste (45g) | Fish sauce (15ml) | Palm sugar (8g) | Jasmine rice (200g) | Thai basil (10g)
Short Description: Rich red curry with coconut milk and tender chicken; serve over jasmine rice with fresh Thai basil.
Instructions: Brown chicken | Simmer curry with coconut milk | Finish with basil; serve hot over jasmine rice.
